tweets.text:
What is tokenized real estate?

Imagine buying a fraction of a luxury London apartment for £50, or investing in NYC commercial property from your phone.

This isn't science fiction—it's tokenized real estate, and it's reshaping how we access the world's largest asset class.

#TokenizedRealEstate #PropTech #RealEstate

Here's how it works:

1️⃣ Property selection & valuation
2️⃣ Legal structure (SPV) 
3️⃣ Token creation on blockchain
4️⃣ Distribution to investors
5️⃣ Ongoing management & dividends

Each token = % ownership of the property.

#FractionalOwnership #RealEstateTech #Investing

Why this matters in 2026:

🚀 Accessibility: No £500k+ needed for London property
💰 Liquidity: Trade 24/7 vs waiting months to sell
🌍 Diversification: Multiple properties, locations, asset classes
📊 Transparency: Blockchain-based ownership records

#PropertyInvestment #UKProperty #RealEstateInnovation

Real-world examples:

🏠 Settley: UK/US focus, £50 minimum
🏠 Lofty.ai: US single-family rentals
🏠 RealT: Ethereum-based fractional ownership

Each platform serves different markets and investor profiles.

#Proptech #RealEstateInvesting #Fintech

Ready to start?

My full beginner's guide covers:
✅ How tokenization actually works
✅ Risks & regulatory considerations  
✅ Step-by-step getting started guide
✅ Future outlook for the market

👉 Read it here: [Link to Medium article]
👉 Follow @mirasettley for more proptech insights!

#Tokenization #RealEstateGuide #InvestingTips
